message:
fix(robot): deterministic output and UTF-8 safe truncation

Bug fixes discovered during code review:

1. generateTailHints: Sort IdleAgents and ActiveAgents slices for
   deterministic output. Go map iteration order is random, which
   caused inconsistent JSON output between runs.

2. truncateMessage: Use rune count instead of byte count to handle
   UTF-8 correctly. The old implementation could corrupt multi-byte
   characters by cutting in the middle of a UTF-8 sequence.

Added UTF-8 test cases to verify truncation works with emoji and
CJK characters.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
